reason: Impending central bank inflation tests create significant macroeconomic uncertainty and potential for high volatility. Increased regulatory scrutiny adds further risk to the broader crypto market, though continued institutional adoption efforts (e.g., Ripple) offer some foundational support. Current market phase likely involves positioning ahead of these key macroeconomic catalysts.
headlines: Oracle jumps 11% premarket as AI demand challenges 'SaaS apocalypse' fears
Coinbase-backed AI payments protocol wants to fix micropayment but demand is just not there yet
Next week could spice things up for bitcoin as seven central banks face an inflation test
Senate Democrats push ban on prediction market bets tied to war and death
